title: SkyboxTemplate
description: A resource pack template and examples for skybox  core shaders
body:
**SkyboxTemplate** is a resource pack that uses core shaders to add multiple new skyboxes to the game. These are rendered using item displays and can be used for many different effects.

![Skybox with Clouds](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b462153a646e4a68e6a76fe6494f70902aa8f1d6_0.webp)

You can use it **together with my plugin** [SkyboxEngine](https://modrinth.com/plugin/skyboxengine) to handle the creation of the item displays but you can also use it **standalone**!

More information on how to use it an the Skybox Engine integration can be found on the [Github Repository](https://github.com/Dragoncraft000/SkyboxTemplate)

## Features

### Skybox Shader Setup
By default, the pack contains the resource pack setup for nine different skybox shaders and more can be added easily by copying the files for the provided skyboxes.

### Example Shaders
Different Skybox effects with comments to explain how things work to help you understand aeverything and allow you to add your own effects.
### Shader Utility
Utility functions to use in your shaders such as colors, gradients, noise and texture mapping

### Shader Notice
Due to this pack making use of core shaders it is not compatible with iris or otpfine shaderpacks. Having iris installed is fine but the sykbxo shaders will not be visible as soon as you activate a shaderpack.
